The Collections

Flower Girl Sets

Soft crowns, sturdy pouches, and pearls that won't come undone — pieces gentle enough for small hands, and finished well enough to become tomorrow's keepsake.

From $85 · Made to order
Built to Survive a Five-Year-Old
For the Youngest Guests

Made for Photographs, Sized for Children

A flower girl accessory has to survive a full ceremony — and a child. Every set here is built around that truth: stitched construction, nothing sharp, nothing heavy, nothing glued-only.

  • Lightweight, flexible crown bands with no exposed wire ends
  • Adjustable ribbon closures — sized from a simple head measurement, no fitting needed
  • Pearl-handle petal pouch as a spill-proof alternative to the traditional basket
  • Colors echoing your palette at its softest, so she rhymes with the bridal party
Begin Your Custom Order Also available on Etsy
Made after you order · about two weeks in the making

Little Ones, Lovingly Dressed
